name: Planview Enterprise Portfolio Management API
what_it_does: Planview REST API for enterprise portfolio and project management platform. Enables AI agents to manage project portfolio and investment prioritization, handle capacity and resource management workflows, access Agile delivery and team performance data, retrieve strategic roadmap and OKR alignment data, manage program and dependency tracking, handle time tracking and utilization data, access financial and budget management for projects, retrieve portfolio analytics and milestone reporting, manage change and risk management, and integrate portfolio data with ERP, ITSM, and strategy execution platforms.
use_cases: Managing project portfolio prioritization from enterprise PMO automation agents
Accessing resource capacity and utilization from workforce planning agents
Retrieving Agile team delivery and velocity from engineering management agents
Integrating portfolio data with strategy and OKR from executive reporting agents
not_for: Small team project management without enterprise portfolio complexity
Simple Agile tools without enterprise PPM and portfolio investment management
Non-enterprise organizations without multi-program portfolio oversight
best_when: A large enterprise, IT department, or PMO using Planview wants AI agents to automate portfolio prioritization, resource management, delivery analytics, financial tracking, and strategic alignment reporting.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Portfolio investment prioritization data is highly confidential strategic business information. Resource allocation automation affects employee assignments and utilization. Budget data is sensitive financial information. Automated portfolio decisions must have executive oversight.

auth.notes: Planview uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials with portfolio, project, and resource scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for portfolio and project events. Planview has acquired multiple products (LeanKit, Tasktop, Clarizen) — platform consolidating.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise PPM pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user enterprise pricing; annual contracts; implementation services
pricing.notes: Austin, Texas. Private equity owned (Vista Equity Partners). Founded 1989. Enterprise PPM and portfolio management platform. Used by 4,500+ customers in 64 countries. Revenue $500M+. Acquired Tasktop (Agile), Changepoint, LeanKit, and Spigit. Multi-product portfolio consolidating. Competes with ServiceNow PPM and Microsoft Project for enterprise portfolio management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Portfolio investment data is confidential strategic business information
Multi-product acquisition strategy — API surface varies by Planview product (Enterprise One, LeanKit, Tasktop)
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Resource allocation automation affects employee assignments — HR implications
Portfolio consolidation in progress — verify which API version matches your deployed product
Vista Equity private equity ownership — verify current product roadmap and API investment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Portfolio investment and project data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Strategic business intelligence.

security_score_components.security_notes: Portfolio and PPM data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Strategic investment sensitivity.
